name: Skill request
about: Propose a new skill for the Realty Stack bundle
title: '[skill request] '
labels: skill-request

## What workflow does this address?

<!-- A specific realtor workflow. Example: "Drafting per-listing social posts 
     across Instagram + Facebook in my voice + brand." 
     Be concrete — vague "AI for X" requests usually don't fit. -->


## How often do you do this manually?

<!-- 5x/week, 20x/month, etc. Frequency helps prioritize. -->


## What's your current workaround?

<!-- ChatGPT? Canva? Manual? Another tool? -->


## What would "great" output look like?

<!-- Paste a real example (sanitized) of what you'd want the skill to produce. 
     Or describe the format + voice + length. -->


## Tier

- [ ] **Tier 1 — Universal** (no FUB or external services needed; works on any Claude surface)
- [ ] **Tier 2 — FUB-connected** (requires the bundled `fub-mcp-server`; FUB account)
- [ ] **Tier 3 — Realty Brain** (paid sibling SaaS — NOT this repo)


## Have you read CONTRIBUTING.md?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Not yet — I'll read it before drafting a PR


## Anything else?

<!-- Related skills, existing competitors, compliance considerations -->
